reasoning: `push_to_set_eq_to_set_insert` is external_body asserting `s.push(e).to_set() == s.to_set().insert(e)` without proof. Unverified trust assumption.
Empty sequence mapped produces empty sequence, whose `to_set()` is empty. `mk_map` on empty set produces empty map with empty values. Correct and expected.

Set insert is idempotent when the element already exists. Combined with the axiom `push(e).to_set() == to_set().insert(e)` and `s.contains(e)` implying `to_set().contains(e)`, this is correct. No new trust surface beyond φ1.
